_note: Synthetic disaster fixture. Live sources: USGS earthquakes feed, NOAA NHC tropical storms, GDACS global alerts.

events.headline: M6.4 earthquake — eastern Taiwan
events.summary: Magnitude 6.4 quake off the eastern coast of Taiwan; semiconductor fab production temporarily halted; aftershocks ongoing.

events.headline: Tropical Storm Bart — Gulf Coast landfall
events.summary: TS Bart making landfall along Louisiana coast; potential disruption to Gulf Coast aerospace manufacturing and shipping.

events.headline: Fire at composite materials facility — southern France
events.summary: Significant fire reported at composites supplier facility in southern France; landing gear and airframe composite supply impacted.
